facts.label: Company set-up fee
facts.value: S$315 (S$15 name application and S$300 incorporation)

facts.label: Company legal status
facts.value: A company is a separate legal entity with shareholder limited liability.

facts.label: Company director requirement
facts.value: A company must have at least one director.

facts.label: Company shareholder requirement
facts.value: All companies must have at least one shareholder.

facts.label: Company ongoing obligations
facts.value: Companies must maintain required registers and file annual returns.

entrePassEligibility.label: EntrePass innovator criterion: venture funding
entrePassEligibility.value: Raised at least S$100,000 from a single funding round from an eligible investor (e.g. a recognised venture capital, business angel, or government-backed fund).

entrePassEligibility.label: EntrePass innovator criterion: incubator or accelerator support
entrePassEligibility.value: Backed by a government-recognised or internationally renowned incubator or accelerator programme.

entrePassEligibility.label: EntrePass innovator criterion: entrepreneurial track record
entrePassEligibility.value: Founded and sold a business that was venture-backed or owned innovative technologies.

entrePassEligibility.label: EntrePass innovator criterion: intellectual property
entrePassEligibility.value: Holds intellectual property registered with an approved national IP institution.

entrePassEligibility.label: EntrePass innovator criterion: research collaboration
entrePassEligibility.value: Has an active, relevant research collaboration in Singapore with a university, research institution, or similar entity.
